statusMessage:
output mismatch (see 1483.out.bad)
7a8,16
> Nov 28 20:10:29 00f97ff97fcb pmie[1106421]: /etc/pcp/pmie/pmie: Warning: Performance Co-Pilot Inference Engine (pmie) not permanently enabled.
> Nov 28 20:10:29 00f97ff97fcb pmie[1106421]:     To enable pmie, run the following as root:
> Nov 28 20:10:29 00f97ff97fcb pmie[1106421]:     # /usr/bin/systemctl enable pmie.service
> Nov 28 20:27:32 00f97ff97fcb pmie[1384604]: /etc/pcp/pmie/pmie: Warning: Performance Co-Pilot Inference Engine (pmie) not permanently enabled.
> Nov 28 20:27:32 00f97ff97fcb pmie[1384604]:     To enable pmie, run the following as root:
> Nov 28 20:27:32 00f97ff97fcb pmie[1384604]:     # /usr/bin/systemctl enable pmie.service
> Nov 28 20:36:29 00f97ff97fcb pmie[1491175]: /etc/pcp/pmie/pmie: Warning: Performance Co-Pilot Inference Engine (pmie) not permanently enabled.
> Nov 28 20:36:29 00f97ff97fcb pmie[1491175]:     To enable pmie, run the following as root:
> Nov 28 20:36:29 00f97ff97fcb pmie[1491175]:     # /usr/bin/systemctl enable pmie.service
Check local PMCD is still alive ...
